ol.li: Thread Safety: All ACTIVE -> EXHAUSTED -> GROWING transitions must hold pool->mutex.
Debug Mode: If DEBUG_LEVEL > 0, every pool_free verifies canaries (0xCAFE) at block - 8 and block + size.
Poisoning: GROWING state must fill new memory with 0xDE (Dead) pattern.

div.p: Trigger: pool_init() Guard: pool != NULL Action: Validate config
Trigger: pthread_mutex_init() != 0 Action: Zero pool struct
Trigger: grow_pool() success Action: Create initial chunk
Guard: chunk_count < max_chunks Action: Lock mutex
Trigger: malloc success Action: Link chunk, unlock
Trigger: malloc returns NULL Action: Rollback, unlock
Trigger: pool_free() Action: Block added to free_list
Trigger: pool_free() Guard: canary != expected Action: abort() or Log error
Trigger: pool_destroy() Action: Lock, verify 0 leaks
